summary: Current note revision is clean. All 6 code_refs open at the cited lines and show the claimed mechanisms; the prior-art section is now accurate (Pipecat TTSUpdateSettingsFrame mid-session switch at :769-773, deprecated set_voice at :445; LiveKit update_agent at agent_session.py:1302 swaps agent/TTS but not inside an existing socket; Cartesia per-context with no voice-update path).
